title: Senior DevOps Engineer
degreeRequirement: No strict degree requirement, AWS/Kubernetes certifications preferred
hiringReason: Automating multi-region deployment and tightening Kubernetes security policies.
businessProblem: Frequent deployment delays and lack of unified security audits in cluster configs.
outcomes: Reduce deployment lead time to production from days to under 30 minutes.
Implement automated CIS benchmark compliance checks for all Kubernetes clusters.

responsibilities.text: Maintain and orchestrate multi-tenant Kubernetes clusters on AWS.
Design and manage IaC pipelines using Terraform.
